description: Example OSSF site — clay loam native soil, TCEQ Ch. 285 setback waiver evaluation
_notes: hydraulic_gradient is the dimensionless hydraulic head gradient dh/dL measured in the field or estimated from a potentiometric surface map.
distance_m is the straight-line saturated-zone flow-path length from the edge of the disposal field to the receptor.
treatment_type is metadata only; it informs the narrative but does not change the calculations.
effluent_concentrations override the database default C0 values; omit a constituent to use its database default.
comparison_soil is the high-permeability reference soil used in the contrast section of the report.
